title: Implement gossip envelope, config, dedupe, and wiring
description:
## Scope
- Add realtime config fields and defaults in Rust and Python models.
- Implement gossip envelope schema with producer_id and event_id.
- Add dedupe store with TTL and self-filtering logic.
- Publish gossip notifications on all mutation paths.
- Subscribe and apply overlay writes on receipt.

## Definition of Done
- Both runtimes publish and subscribe with identical envelope semantics.
creator: ryan.porter
